column17: Chart Designer: Dr. Thomas R. Nicely

column2: The 1983 St. Louis Cardinals season was the 64th season the team was in the league. The Cardinals got off to a slow start losing five of their first six games. However, thanks to a strong second half the Cards were able to post their second straight winning season and  finished in third place in their division with a record of 8-7-1. 1983 Pro Bowl Players: WR - Roy Green; P - Carl Birdsong.

column1: 3 Includes positive “T1,” “T2” and “T3” yardage (expected values = 27.5, 55 and 82.5, respectively).
